headline: Mastercard's Stablecoin Moment: SoFiUSD Gets Global Settlement Rails

headline: The Tariff-Proof Stocks Wall Street Is Quietly Piling Into Right Now
summary: While the S&P 500 has gone essentially nowhere year-to-date and the VIX has climbed nearly 30% in a single month, a handful of stocks are quietly doing the opposite. Tariff anxiety is real, consumer sentiment is sitting at 56.4 on the University of Michigan index (recessionary territory), and prediction markets are pricing a roughly 60% ... headline: 'E-shaped' economy is replacing a K-shaped one in 2026, economist says: The middle class is 'spending in a nervous way' now
summary: Economist Heather Long says the U.S. economy is diverging into three tiers of consumer behavior instead of two, amid an ongoing affordability crisis.

headline: Cramer Says Skip Klarna Despite Buy-Now-Pay-Later Buzz
summary: Jim Cramer just handed investors a clear pecking order in the payments space, and if you own Klarna, pay attention. Following a major Bank of America rollout covering five names in payments and buy-now-pay-later, Cramer laid out exactly where he stands. BofA likes all five.
